ops.text:
RESULTS (pure compute, $0 spend — no LLM calls).

PRIMARY (Qwen3-8B token-level normalized Levenshtein, DPO train n=470):
- small_edit_share (d<0.20) = 0.0447 (21/470); nonparametric bootstrap 95% CI [0.0277, 0.0638] (10k resamples, seed=26).
- Distance quantiles: p0=0.00, p5=0.259, p10=0.403, p25=0.606, p50=0.789, p75=0.902, p90=0.952, p95=0.965, p100=0.995; mean=0.723, std=0.234.
- Distribution is strongly right-skewed toward HIGH distance (chosen and rejected are dissimilar): 71+68+52=191/470 pairs sit in [0.85,1.00).
- share d<0.05 = 2.8%, d<0.10 = 3.4%, d<0.30 = 6.2%. n_identical (chosen==rejected exactly) = 5.

ROBUSTNESS across tokenizers (train small_edit_share): Qwen=0.0447, word=0.0489, char=0.0489 — all ~4.5-4.9%, CI upper bounds <=0.070. Test (n=48): 0.021 (1/48) all tokenizers. Combined (n=518): 0.042 (Qwen).

CHARACTERIZATION: all 470 pairs are same-file (correction_file==file). The 21 small-edit pairs concentrate in category `direction` (7 near-identical large blocks, d~0.006-0.011, 700-3700 tok) plus the 5 exact-identical pairs (4 wrong_approach, 1 unwanted_action). The DPO chosen/rejected are two distinct render_edit blocks (a correcting edit vs a faulted edit, each its own old->new transform), NOT two candidate answers differing by one token — so the DPOP failure shape is structurally rare here, confirmed by median d=0.79. Aside: the 5 exact-identical pairs carry zero preference signal (degenerate DPO gradient) — a data-hygiene note, not a DPOP risk.

DECISION (pre-registered): small_edit_share_train_qwen = 0.0447 << 0.30 threshold. bakeoff_warranted=FALSE. RECOMMENDATION: SKIP the DPOP arm in Wave 2 — the small-edit risk regime it targets covers <5% of pairs (CI upper 6.4%), so DPOP's log-prob-floor fix addresses a near-absent pathology. DPO/KTO arm decisions are not gated by this probe.

ARTIFACTS (attached): out/summary.json (full per-population/per-tokenizer stats + histograms + bootstrap CIs), out/per_pair.csv (470+48 rows: id, category, split, token/char lengths, d_qwen/d_word/d_char, identical flag — verify lane re-derives from here), out/histogram_train_qwen.png. Script: /Users/yasyf/.cc-steer/experiments/E26/analyze.py. Repro: HF_HUB_OFFLINE=1 uv run --no-sync --with rapidfuzz python analyze.py from /Users/yasyf/Code/cc-steer-exp1.
